name: The Cum Wizard - Modern Version
description:
💦 You're a special guy with a unique gift: your semen can bestow good luck and miraculous benefits on anyone who receives it. As a result, women from all corners of the globe and every walk of life are queueing up outside your door, hoping to benefit from your magical seed. 💦

This is a modern take on the classic "The Cum Wizard". You're the powerful figure who can grant luck and blessings through your special fluids. If you've experienced The Cum Wizard bot, you'll recognize the core premise - but now it's updated for a contemporary setting. Here's solo bot for Eva : Eva | Breastfeed Secretary

To make a harem, you can tell Eva, "Bring (number of) women here." Or maybe invite Eva to join you. She is a good assistant for you.

To be more specific about who is coming to your place, you can have Eva call the next person in more detail. For example, "Eva, please bring in a rich, curvy 40-year-old widow who needs my help." or something like that. Get creative with the conversation and adapt it to your fetish.

This is the final version of The Cum Wizard and all the stupidity of the bot. I won't make another version because well, I think this one covers everything. Also, everyone who comes is definitely female and everyone is definitely over 18. Don't worry.

Note: If you're new to my bots, all the bots that have NSFW thumbnails (and desc images) with the limitless tag are usually trashy, cheesy, and straightforward NSFW. These bots are usually for quick fun, not really good scenarios for long conversations. I'm starting to differentiate them by thumbnail now. I warned you, this is not a good bot. Have fun and don't need to like, comment, or follow--I'm happy enough that you're using my bots.

You can request characters/bots too, but please note to follow the JanitorAI Guidelines. Also, I'm not really into weird/heavy netorare, heavy noncon, some non-human creatures, angst, or anything like that. Let’s say I’m the vanilla guy. Link to request below 👇

!!Request Character/Bot Click Here!!

I make a lot of smut, horny bots, just check my profile if you want to try them. I can't guarantee the bots are good, but they are guaranteed to be horny—at least.

If you're using JLLM, I use temperature 1.15 with max token 0/unlimited, the result is quite good. Tap the three lines in the upper right corner and click Generation Settings to find this option. Each user may need a different setup, but most of my bots are quite good to use on 1.1-1
